title: Control.
content:
O Hunger, Hunger, I will harness thee
    And make thee harrow all my spirit's glebe.
    Of old the blind bard Herve sang so sweet
    He made a wolf to plow his land.
meaning:
Sidney Lanier's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Control."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
